name: White Bean and Tomato Dip
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces great Northern beans, cooked, drained and rinsed
1/8 teaspoon ground red pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. To make 1-1/2 cups of dip: Process beans, lemon juice, bread crumbs, almonds, garlic, basil, and pepper in a food processor until smooth.
2. Stir in the chopped sun-dried tomatoes.
3. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
(Per tablespoon)
44 calories, 0.7 g fat (14%)
0 mg Cholesterol, 9 mg Sodium, 1.6 g dietary fiber
